title: Design leadership in the age of acceleration
speakers: Jen Dunnam (VP, Design, (Formerly) Patreon), Pedro Hernandez (Advocacy Manager, Figma)
key_points: Design leaders face a constant tension as product development accelerates and craft expectations rise: moving fast without losing clarity, quality, or creative foundations.
Building resilient design organizations depends on partnering effectively with product and engineering leadership.
Systems, rituals, and principles are needed to hold up under pressure and keep design organizations resilient.
Drawing on experience supporting creators, the speakers explore how thoughtful processes and systems can enable healthy, resilient, and lasting communities.
